_comment: Frozen webhook-signing test vectors, copied verbatim from the competition's API repo (docs/test_vectors.json). The server-side signer AND the reference verifier both pin to these values, so you can confirm your verifier is wired up correctly without waiting for a real broadcast. Single-signature vectors carry a scalar 'secret'; rotation-overlap vectors carry a 'secrets' list (current secret first) and an 'expected_signature_header' with one space-delimited 'v1,...' signature per secret. Do not edit.

vectors.name: rotation overlap, two signatures (current secret first)
